chapter_title.en: Chapter on Remembering Allah {swt} and Supplicating During the Journey

text: 2421 - وَ رَوَى اَلْعَلاَءُ عَنْ أَبِي عُبَيْدَةَ عَنْ أَحَدِهِمَا عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «إِذَا كُنْتَ فِي سَفَرٍ فَقُلِ: اَللَّهُمَّ اِجْعَلْ مَسِيرِي عَبَراً وَ صَمْتِي تَفَكُّراً وَ كَلاَمِي ذِكْراً ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2421 - Al-Ala’ narrated from Abu ‘Ubaydah, from one of the Imams (as), who said:
"When you are on a journey, say: 'O Allah (swt), make my traveling a source of lessons, my silence a form of reflection, and my speech a means of remembrance.'"
